revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:愛宕神社 (松島町)]] [[ja:愛宕神社 (松島町)]] {{infobox religious building | name = Atago Shrine (Matsushima Town) | image = File:Matsushima Atago Jinja in 2007.jpg | address = {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}} {{ill|Matsushima, Miyagi|en|Matsushima, Miyagi|qid=Q1349082|lt=Matsushima Town|1=Matsushima, Miyagi}}, Takashiro, Asuka, 1 | location = {{Coord|38|23|37.87|N|141|4|6.33|E|type:landmark_region:JP-04|display=inline,title|qq=}} | deity = (Not specified) | creation = Established in the {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki Era|1=Meireki}} 3 (1657) | festival = July 24 | map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi Prefecture|label=Atago Shrine|float=center|relief=1|width=256|qq=}} | location = {{ill|Takagi|qid=Q111929388|1=Takagi}} | coordinates = {{Coord|38.393853|N|141.068425|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} == Overview == '''Atago Shrine (Matsushima Town)''' (愛宕神社) is a Shinto shrine located in Takashiro, Matsushima Town, Miyagi Prefecture. It is one of the many shrines dedicated to the Atago faith and stands on a low mountain called Atago-yama near the famous scenic area. == History == It was originally built in 1657 by the monk Morikiyo and later relocated in the Taishō period. == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://sannoushrinenoto.wixsite.com/mysite Official website of Atago Shrine (Matsushima Town)]
{{translated page|ja|愛宕神社 (松島町)|version=89940482|comment=Imported full ja history}}
